steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content: Subtract $2{,}740x$ from both sides of $2{,}740x=5{,}480x$ to get $$0=2{,}740x.$$

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: Dividing by $2{,}740$ gives the unique solution $x=0$. B is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches the correct answer, Exactly one. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so B is correct.
